requirements.task_name: Find and copy the SWIFT code for a specific Dubai bank branch
requirements.task_description: Locate the exact branch page for 'Emirates NBD - Bur Dubai Main Branch' and use the site controls to copy its primary SWIFT/BIC code to the clipboard.
existing_variables: branch_search_view_states  // contains mode, search_query, city_filter, service_type_filters, etc.
recently_viewed_branches   // ordered branchId list; used to see which branch detail page was opened
branches                   // branch metadata (name, city, area, swift_primary_code, etc.)

requirements.task_name: Save the cheapest Dubai Islamic Bank branch for international transfers under 20 AED
requirements.task_description: Filter all Dubai Islamic Bank branches by outgoing international transfer fee, limit fees to 20 AED or less, then sort and save the branch with the lowest fee to favorites.
existing_variables: branch_fee_schedules       // contains fee_type, currency_code, amount, etc.
saved_branches             // which branches have been saved, with created_at/source
banks                      // bank metadata (to identify Dubai Islamic Bank)

required_variables.set_condition: Every time getFeeComparisonResults(bankId, feeType, maxFeeAmount, currencyCode, sortBy) is called, overwrite this key with the exact parameters used.
required_variables.reason: Persists the filter and sort criteria actually used in the fee comparison so the evaluator can confirm that the user filtered by Dubai Islamic Bank, fee type 'outgoing international transfer', max fee 20 AED or less, and sorted by fee amount ascending.

required_variables.set_condition: When saveBranch(branchId, ...) is called AND the most recent task2_feeComparisonParams object indicates feeType === 'outgoing_international_transfer' and bankId corresponds to Dubai Islamic Bank (and optionally currencyCode === 'AED'), set this key to branchId.
required_variables.reason: Links the branch saved immediately after a qualifying Dubai Islamic Bank fee comparison to the comparison parameters, allowing the evaluator to check that this branch is indeed the cheapest with outgoing international transfer fee ≤ 20 AED under those filters.

requirements.task_name: Find a late-opening corporate branch in Dubai Marina and copy its routing code
requirements.task_description: Locate a corporate banking branch in Dubai Marina that closes at or after 8:00 PM and copy its local routing/branch code.
existing_variables: branch_search_view_states  // to verify area_filter='Dubai Marina', service_type_filters includes 'corporate_banking', closing_time_filter='after_8_pm'
recently_viewed_branches   // to identify which branch detail page was opened
branches                   // to check service types, area, city, weekday_close_time, routing_code

requirements.task_name: Validate an IBAN and retrieve the SWIFT code of its Deira branch
requirements.task_description: Use the IBAN validator tool to check a specific IBAN, navigate from the result to the associated bank, then open a Deira branch and copy its SWIFT code.
existing_variables: recently_viewed_branches   // which branches were opened after validation
branches                   // branch metadata including area, city, swift_primary_code, bank_id

requirements.task_name: Compare USD transfer cut-off times in Deira and save the earlier one
requirements.task_description: Find Deira branches that handle USD transfers for Emirates NBD and Mashreq Bank, compare their USD transfer cut-off times side by side, and save the branch with the earlier cut-off time.
existing_variables: branch_currency_supports    // used by getBranchComparisonDetails to derive USD cutoff times
saved_branches              // to see which branch was saved from comparison (source='branch_comparison')

requirements.task_name: Add two First Abu Dhabi Bank branches supporting both EUR and USD to a comparison list
requirements.task_description: Filter First Abu Dhabi Bank branches in Dubai that support both EUR and USD international transfers, then add the first two results to the comparison view.
existing_variables: branch_search_view_states   // to read bank_name_filter and currency_filters
branch_comparison_sets      // to see branch_ids added to comparison
branch_currency_supports    // to verify EUR and USD support

requirements.task_name: Bookmark a guide explaining Dubai IBAN structure with reading time under 10 minutes
requirements.task_description: Find an educational article about Dubai IBAN structure with an estimated reading time of 10 minutes or less and add it to your reading list using the bookmark feature.

requirements.task_name: Submit a correction request for an incorrect branch code
requirements.task_description: Open the details page for 'ABC Bank - Jumeirah Branch' and submit an issue report specifying that the branch code should end with 789 instead of 798, marking the urgency as medium and requesting a copy of the report.
existing_variables: branches                   // to confirm the branch identity
